description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish releases that runs on every push. It has two jobs: create-release and pyinstaller-executable. The create-release job checks out the source code, determines a tag, deletes any previous release and tag, tags the release, and creates a new release. The pyinstaller-executable job builds and publishes executables for multiple operating systems, including Mac OS and Windows, and notifies collaborators of the release.
